name: Tuna & White Bean
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet or saucepan, combine the cannellini beans, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, and parsley.
2. Cook over low to moderate heat until the beans are hot, about five minutes.
3. Spoon the mixture over cooked pasta (medium shells, bow ties, or other shapes).
4. Break the tuna on top into coarse chunks.
5. Garnish with scallions and plenty of black pepper.
